titleStmt.title: SII 9.178: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 178. (A.R. No. 104 of 1904.) ON A SLAB SET UP INSIDE THE MALE-MALLAPPA TEMPLE IN THE SAME VILLAGE.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Chālukya-Vikrama year 33, Sarvadhāri, Pushya, ba. 9, Ādityavāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1108 December 28 Sunday; f.d.t. ·46, Uttarāyaṇa beginning on the 24th of the month. It mentions the Chālukya feudatory, the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Tribhuvanamalla Vīra-Pāṇḍyadēva ruling over Noḷambavādi thirtytwo-thousand, Vijaya-Pāṇḍyadēva and the Mahāpasāyita Vijaya-Hemmāḍi-Daṇḍanāyaka. It records that Kappiseṭṭi, Honnabāchayya, the Sēnabōva Padmaṇa, Sarvadēva-Nāyaka, Māhaṇṇa, the Sēnabōva Saṅkaṇṇa and others made gifts of various plots of land for the service of the god Divyaliṅga-Nīlēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namaśśaṁkarāya(ḥ) . pūjyānāmapi pūjyāya vēdhasāmapi vēdhasāṁ . samaṁ catu
rmukhairgītabrahmaṇē brahmaṇē namaḥ .
svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ kāṁcīpuravarādhīśvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁ
baradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttāṁḍa paricchēdigaṁ
ḍaṁ rācigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīmatu hariharadēvapādābjabhriṁgaṁ nāmā
disamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ tribhuvanamallavīrapā
ṇḍyadēvaru noḷaṁbavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭani
grahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁ māḍi sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttamire
tatpādapadmōpajīvi . śrīvijayapāṇḍyadēva
vallabhanahitamaṇḍaḷēśvarakuḷavidrāvaṇa
ḷasitabāhudaṇḍanāhavaśauṇḍa . Arinarapālamauḷi
ru pādapankēruhanarātibhīkarakarīṁdra bhiḥ na
śirapādapayōrṇnavakuṁdahāsipāṁḍaranijakīrttivarttitamahīvaḷaya vibhupā
ja . taccaraṇāraviṁdōpajīvi . śrīvijayapāṇḍyadēvamahī
yugaṣaṭcaraṇaṁ pāvanacaritaṁ viśvamahīvarttitaviśuddhakīrtti camū
pa . dāśarathigaṇuvaneṁtu kuśēśayanābhaṁge nanteṁte nijādhipa ge vijaya
pāṇḍyanarēśaṁganuvartti hemmadaṁḍādhīśa . svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpra
dhānaṁ śrīkaraṇaṁ sarvvādhyakṣaṁ taṁtrādhiṣṭhāyakaṁ maneverggaḍe ma
hāpasāyitaṁ vijayahemmāḍidaṇḍanāyakaru śrīmadvijaya
pāṇḍyadēvara mahārājakāryyakriyāvi sukhaviralu .
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇa pārāyaṇaja
pahōmasamādhiśīḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmadhariścaṁdradattiyagra
hāraṁ bāḷguḷiyaśēṣamahājanamayvadiṁbara sadhānninadalu svastyanēkaguṇāḷaṁ
kārasatyaśaucācāracāritranayavineyaśīḷaguṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu ku
vaṁśānvayārappa śrimanmahāvaḍḍabyavahāri cinnageyi kappiseṭṭiyaru svasti śrī
vikramavarṣada 33 neya sarvvadhārisaṁvatsarada puṣya ba 9 mi Ādivāra
daṁdina Uttarāyaṇasaṁkrāntiyaṁdu bhaktajanacintāmaṇiyappa śrīmaddibyaliṁgaṁ nīlēśvaradēvargge nāgarāśipaṇḍitara
kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrbbakaṁ māḍi © kaṁcameyageṟeya gardde Āśāvanitumaṁ biṭṭaṁ
samastavastugaṇasaṁpannarappa śrīmatu Ayvadimbara putra honnabācayya biṭṭa begeyara keṟeya
gardde kamma nūṟayvattu mattavavaṁ kalidēva mūḍeyakaṭṭada gardde kamma nūṟu mattaṁ samastavastu
guṇagaṇāḷaṁkāra cārucāritranayavineyaśīlācārasaṁpannarappa śrimatu sēnabō
va ṇnaṁgaḷa putra sēnubōva padmaṇanu biṭṭa mūḍeyakaṭṭada gardde kamma 120 mattaṁ Arṇnamāḷe
yaṣaṇaṁgiyara śarvvadēvanāyakanu biṭṭa mūḍeyakaṭṭada kamma 100 mattaṁ huruvaḷiya cikkaṇa
nu mūḍeyakeṭṭada gadde kamma 70 mattaṁ Eṁjabeya māhaṇnanu biṭṭa kappurageṟeya gadde kamma 130 mattaṁ
kuṟuvettiya Īśvarabhaṭṭara putraṁ sēnubōva saṁkaṇnanu biṭṭa hūvi(ṁ)na tōṁṭada Ere kamma 60
kaṁcavveyageṟeya garddeyalli baḍagi rebbōjage baḍagigaddeyāgi koṭṭa gadde kamma 50 Ī dharmma maṁ
pratipāḷisidavargge prayāge vāraṇāsi gurūkṣētradoḷsāsirbbarvvēdapāragargge sāsirbba
kapileyanubhayamukhigoṭṭa phaḷamakku Ī dharmmamanaḷidātanāsthānadoḷanitu kavileymanā brāhmaṇa
rumanaḷida mahāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasundharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimi ḥ ©
Digital edition of SII 9.178 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
